commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a synchronous OpenCode Go bundled static-catalog fallback for context-window resolution, exposes a provider catalog entry, and splits OpenCode Go models into active and compatibility runtime rows.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main memory flush uses sync context resolution with allowAsyncLoad false and falls back to DEFAULT_CONTEXT_TOKENS when OpenCode Go cache/config metadata is absent, and the linked issue includes live compaction evidence.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The PR needs author or maintainer handling because the rebase is mechanical but the model-catalog support policy is a human compatibility decision.
